provider: HKUST 2025/26 BSc in Quantitative Social Analysis Major Requirements
note: The official PDF is headed 2026-27 requirements for the 2025-26 intake. This supplement records the 41 explicit coded rows in the Major Requirements, including required alternatives, the bounded Foundation list and the bounded QSA Methodological Elective list. The open rule allowing any other SOSC course, subject to the published exclusions, is not expanded into a fabricated closed list. SOSC1450 and SOSC3600 remain because the intake-specific PDF explicitly lists them, while noting that both were last offered in 2020-21 and deleted subsequently. University Common Core requirements are outside this Programme-local supplement, so these rows must not be treated as a graduation-completion decision.
